fields.summary: Form crashes on submit when email field contains unicode characters
fields.description:
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Navigate to /settings/profile
2. Enter an email with unicode chars (e.g., tëst@example.com)
3. Click Save

## Expected Behavior
Form validates email and shows appropriate error or saves successfully.

## Actual Behavior
Page crashes with unhandled TypeError. Console shows: `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'normalize')`.

## Affected Component
ProfileForm.vue - email validation logic in `validateEmail()` method.
